markdown.markdown:
The **First National Conference on Bioactive Molecules** will take place over **two days**, bringing together keynote lectures, oral presentations, poster sessions, and scientific discussions.

> **Dates:** November 29–30, 2026\
> **Venue:** Higher National School of Biotechnology (ENSB), Constantine, Algeria

------------------------------------------------------------------------


### Opening Ceremony

| Time          | Activity          |
|---------------|-------------------|
| 08:00 – 09:00 | Registration      |
| 09:00 – 09:30 | Opening Ceremony  |
| 09:30 – 10:00 | Welcome Address   |
| 10:00 – 11:00 | Keynote Lecture 1 |
| 11:00 – 11:30 | Coffee Break      |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Scientific Session I

**Topic 1: Pharmacology of Bioactive Molecules and Citizen Health**

| Time          | Activity           |
|---------------|--------------------|
| 11:30 – 13:00 | Oral Presentations |
| 13:00 – 14:00 | Lunch Break        |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Scientific Session II

**Topic 2: Bioactive Molecules for Food Security and Agro-industry**

| Time          | Activity                    |
|---------------|-----------------------------|
| 14:00 – 15:30 | Oral Presentations          |
| 15:30 – 16:00 | Coffee Break                |
| 16:00 – 17:30 | Poster Session & Discussion |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Day 2 — Monday, November 30, 2026

### Scientific Session III

**Topic 3: Microbial Biotechnologies and Energy Security**

| Time          | Activity           |
|---------------|--------------------|
| 09:00 – 10:30 | Oral Presentations |
| 10:30 – 11:00 | Coffee Break       |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Scientific Session IV

**Topic 4: Environmental Valorization and Preservation**

| Time          | Activity           |
|---------------|--------------------|
| 11:00 – 12:30 | Oral Presentations |
| 12:30 – 14:00 | Lunch Break        |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Scientific Session V

**Topic 5: Digital Innovation and Artificial Intelligence in Biotechnology**

| Time          | Activity           |
|---------------|--------------------|
| 14:00 – 15:30 | Oral Presentations |
| 15:30 – 16:00 | Coffee Break       |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Closing Ceremony

| Time          | Activity                 |
|---------------|--------------------------|
| 16:00 – 16:30 | Best Presentation Awards |
| 16:30 – 17:00 | Closing Remarks          |
| 17:00         | End of Conference           |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Scientific Themes

The scientific program is organized around the following thematic areas:

1.  Pharmacology of Bioactive Molecules and Citizen Health
2.  Bioactive Molecules for Food Security and Agro-industry
3.  Microbial Biotechnologies and Energy Security
4.  Environmental Valorization and Preservation
5.  Digital Innovation and Artificial Intelligence in Biotechnology

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: callout-note
## Program Updates

The detailed scientific program, including keynote speakers, oral presentations, and poster sessions, will be published after the abstract acceptance notifications.
:::
